'''lazhudhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:uvulatome|uvulatome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:uvulatome|uvulatome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lazhudhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læzhidhith|læzhidhith]] || [[word:læzhidhij|læzhidhij]] || [[word:læzhidhish|læzhidhish]] || [[word:læzhidhi|læzhidhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lazhuzhudhuth|lazhuzhudhuth]] || [[word:lazhuzhudhuj|lazhuzhudhuj]] || [[word:lazhuzhudhush|lazhuzhudhush]] || [[word:lazhuzhudhu|lazhuzhudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lazhudhuth|lazhudhuth]] || [[word:lazhudhuj|lazhudhuj]] || [[word:lazhudhush|lazhudhush]] || [[word:lazhudhu|lazhudhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lazhufdhuth|lazhufdhuth]] || [[word:lazhufdhuj|lazhufdhuj]] || [[word:lazhufdhush|lazhufdhush]] || [[word:lazhufdhuf|lazhufdhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lazhudhuthu|lazhudhuthu]] || [[word:lazhudhuju|lazhudhuju]] || [[word:lazhudhushu|lazhudhushu]] || [[word:lazhudhuku|lazhudhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lazhudhuth|lazhudhuth]] || [[word:lazhudhuj|lazhudhuj]] || [[word:lazhudhush|lazhudhush]] || [[word:lazhudhu|lazhudhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lazhudhuthul|lazhudhuthul]] || [[word:lazhudhujul|lazhudhujul]] || [[word:lazhudhushul|lazhudhushul]] || [[word:lazhudhukul|lazhudhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lazhudhuthuthu|lazhudhuthuthu]] || [[word:lazhudhujuju|lazhudhujuju]] || [[word:lazhudhushushu|lazhudhushushu]] || [[word:lazhudhuku|lazhudhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lazhudhuthun|lazhudhuthun]] || [[word:lazhudhujun|lazhudhujun]] || [[word:lazhudhushun|lazhudhushun]] || [[word:lazhudhukun|lazhudhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lazhudhuthuoro|lazhudhuthuoro]] || [[word:lazhudhujuoro|lazhudhujuoro]] || [[word:lazhudhushuoro|lazhudhushuoro]] || [[word:lazhudhukuoro|lazhudhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d0c3b9f}}
